chapter_title.en: On Traditions From al-Ridha About Unity

text: 25 - وَبِهذَا الإسناد عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سَنان قالَ سَأَلْته - يَعْنِي الرِّضا عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ - عَنِ الاسم ما هُوَ؟ فَقالَ: صِفَةٌ لِمَوصُوف.

en.dr-ali-peiravi: 11-25 According to the same documentation, it is narrated that Muhammad ibn Sinan asked him (s) (i.e. Al-Ridha (s)) what a name is. The Imam (s) replied, “It is something to describe something else with.”
